message:
beads: add Track V VDBE interpreter acceleration roadmap (17 new beads)

Full performance-track planning: V1 (zero-copy page access), V2
(superinstruction fusion), V3 (speculative JIT), plus V-TEST gate
beads for each tier. Also adds OLD/NEW pseudo-table frame stack bead
for trigger execution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
